question.label: Self-read opener
question.name: Before I share my view, how do you think the last stretch has gone?
question.description: Anchors the conversation in their self-assessment first; gap vs manager's view becomes a signal.

assessment.note: The answer 'yes' is non-informative and doesn't engage with the axes of clarity or engagement.

new_queue.label: What they're proud of
new_queue.name: What's something from the last quarter you're genuinely proud of — not what looks good, what actually was good?

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?

new_queue.label: Current workload clarity
new_queue.name: What part of your current workload feels the least clear in terms of expectations or priorities?

new_queue.label: Delegation challenges
new_queue.name: What part of delegation feels most challenging for you right now?

new_queue.label: Stakeholder relationship
new_queue.name: How are your relationships with executive peers evolving?

new_queue.label: Energy management
new_queue.name: How sustainable does your current pace feel for you?

new_queue.label: Director role clarity
new_queue.name: What aspects of the director role feel most and least clear to you?
